name: Tangled Bundle
descs: When the ally with the fastest Speed deals damage to an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed', deal +12.5% damage.

When <style="upgradeHighlight">2</style> allies with the fastest Speed deals damage to an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed', deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+15%</style> damage.

When <style="upgradeHighlight">3</style> allies with the fastest Speed deals damage to an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed', deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+20%</style> damage.
